scripts.build:compose: bun run build.ts --outdir=api/public/static-spa && bun scripts/write-spa-htaccess.ts api/public/static-spa
scripts.composer:backend: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php install
scripts.test:backend: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php test
scripts.test:backend:coverage: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php test:coverage-bootstrap
scripts.analyse:backend: docker compose run --rm --entrypoint composer php analyse
scripts.ci:local: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run build:compose && bun run test:backend:coverage && bun run analyse:backend
